Appearances:
Plaintiff Stephens Apartments is present. Represented by Chris Dressel.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Blythe Kahill is present.
Attorney Bart Hanson appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAR-02-2015 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
